1205690 +

229TT77088F99FATT777777777777777777C66667FF788FT:7TT7AT1T77AT11117767FF7T77AT11111111777777F7T77AT11111777777F7TT:77F7T77AT11111777777F7TT:77F7T77T:7CCC117TT:TFTT:T:7TT115367F1T:7TTTTTT1-1---------T:17TT:G7G111867TT:77777-19C0GF6A2:C0GF6AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA8666666666666AT757:7TTT:77TT:7TT97TCC77TT931A8CCC766:TTT:T:17727G177AATT7777708887TTTTTTTTGGGGGGT-C71733377777777777777778T66:TTT:T:17727G177AATT7777708887TTTTTTTTGGGGGGT-C71733377777777777777778T66:TTT:T:17727G1TT:T:7TT:7TTGGG5ATCC2CC99FA9FTT:T:7TT:T:7TT:::::367F1T:7TTTT7088888877777777C66667FF788FT:7TT7AT1T77AT66666666666666C36TTTTGGGGGGT-C7173337777F1T:7T7F7T77AT11111777777F7T6666666GGGGGG1777F7FF777FGFGTC777-GF6A2:C0GF6AAAAAAAA277777767TT::7T117A--FTT:C717717333TT:77TT:7TT9T:T:T9T:T:T97TTC11111111177767T666666666666666666666666666666666666GGGGGG1777F7FF97777088888877-777777777797-77777775666177AATAAAA7T-117T7F77999F1111-999722977999F1111-999722977AAAAAAAG1TT:T:7TT:7TTGGG5A444444444444444444444444444444444477F1T:7T7F7T77AT1111177F1T:7T7F7TTTTT7T77:7CCCT-C7177769-C717:7T7F7T77AT1317717333TT:77TT717333TT:77TT717333TT:77TT717333TTT:T:7TT:FGTC777866666T:T:AT111AT176T:TT176617TGGGGGT:7FF7TTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTT764770TCC47997775666177AATAAAA7T-117T7F7F11117F7F7T77AT14444444444444666664G7957-777111867TTCC77F-A66666T7T7TGGGG22222222229722:77TT:75F7T77ATT717333TT:77TT717333TTT:T:7TT:FGTGTGTGTGTGTGTGTG9FT7T111AT176T:TT0GF611AT-9997777-9999332224477T176T:TT176617TGGGGGT:7FF7TTTTTTTAAAAT:GG6661771111176617TGGGGGT:7F71737777777TT:TF777G764770GGGT:74444444444444444444448T66:TTTTT7778877-7777088FT1117767FF770TCC4FF788FT:7TT7AT1T77AT66666666666666C36TTTTGGGGGGT-CF6GGGGG147TTCC77F-A66666T7T7TGGGG22222222C0GF6AAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAA8666666666666ATT1766666666ATT1766666666ATT1766666666ATT176:7TT7T114TGGGGGT:7FF7TTTTTTTAAAAT:GG66617711166667777771TAAAAT617:7C:7FFA17TT:7T7777-6666666666T17FF77TT777799CCT11TT:66666666T17FF77TT777799TTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTTT4444TT:T:1111111T66666666666666C36TTTTGGGGGGT-CF6GGGGG147TTCC77F-A66666T7GAATT1-----T99999:--7777GAATT1-----T99999:--7777GAATT1-----T99999:--7777GAATT56TTT811177176:7TT7433TT972297797TT7433F7TTTTTAAAAG1TT:T:7TT:7TTGGG5A4444444444444444444444444TTTTT-6661771111176617TGGGGGT:7TTTT777086ATT176GGGGGGTTTTTT99CCT176GGGGGGTTTTTT99CCT176GGGGGG111-9997TT97TCCCCCCCCCCCCC708887TTTTCCCCCC57T9F7TAAAA7T-117--77777TT:TFTT:TT:TFTT:T:7TT115367F1T:7TTTTTT1-1--------171176617TTF6A4--7777TTGGG5A4444444444444444AATT1-----T99999:--7777GAAT7799G5A4677176:7TT7433TT972297797TT7433F7TTTTTTGGGG177TTTT44444444444444444444TA4444441766617T22C0-9997TT9778877-6666666666666666TTTTT9AAAA7T-177TTTTTTTT--899F111417T7F7711-9997TT97TCCCCCCCCCCCCC708887TTTTCCCCCC57T9F7TAAAA7G777G1F76617TT:TFTT:TT:TT:TFTT:TCCCAAAAA6999996T117A-866666666AAAA7T-117T7F7F11117F7F7T77AT17TT1G147TTCF11117F7F7T77AT17TT1G147TTCF11117FF7TTTT09CCT2617TA--F117717727G177AATT7777708887TTT887TT111TTT:T:17727G17-6666666666666666TTTTT9AAAA7T-177TTTTTTTT--899F111417T7F7711-9997TT97TCCCCCCCCCCCCC70888777727G17727G17666667566--77-7T9F7TAAAA7G777G7TAAA666666T11-99C777GTCCA9G-77--------1797F-A66CCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCGGGGGGTTTTTT99CCT176GGGGGG111-9997TT97TCCCCCCCCCCCCC708887TTTTCCCCCC574C574C577708887TTT88TT97TCCCCCCCCCCCCC708887TTT2222GF7F7T77AC708222GT777086ATT176GGGGGGTTTTTT99CCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCC7TT97T44TT:T:1111111T66666666666666C36TTTTGGGGGGT-CF6GGGGG147TCCCCCC1117CCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCC8887TTT88TT97TCCCCCCCCCCCCC708887TTT2222GF7F7T77AC708222GT777086ATT176GGGGGGTTTTTT99CCCCC37TCCCCCCCCCCCC708887TTT2222GF7F76666666666666666TTTTT9AAAA7TCCCC9750G77:5G77:574CCGTGAA7T5777GAA7T5777GAA7T5777GAA7T5777GAA7T57775777GA7T57777GA6ATTT444CCCCCCCCCCCT777086ATT176GGGGGGTTTTTT99CCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCCC8887TTT88TT97TCCCCCCCCCCCCC708887TTT2222GF7F7147TCCC6GG17T788877-6666666666666666TTTTT9AAAA7T-177TTTTTTTT--899F111417T7F7711-9997TT97TCCCCCCCCCCCCC70888777727G17727G1766666799
